name: hardware-catalogue
description: Landseed hardware catalogue — a no-build-step Three.js (ESM importmap) + GSAP static site deployed to Cloudflare Pages. Catalogue bay (src/) plus /demo/, /ai/, /faqs/ satellites.

scripts.lint: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/world.js && node --check src/devices.js && node --check ai/ai.js && node --check ai/map.js && node --check ai/map3d.js && node --check ai/species.js && node --check faqs/faqs.js && node --check demo/demo.js
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run check
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && npx wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=hardware-catalogue --branch=main
